description.value:
Starting at 1st level, the genetics of your clan manifest, taking the form of eyes that allow you to bend objects and space.

You may spend a bonus action to activate your mystic eyes, for the next minute or until you fall unconscious, whichever happen first. giving your eyes a red glow, 30ft of chakra sight and letting you create tendrils of chakra that you can direct towards anything you see, known as Vectors.

These vectors are invisible to all creatures without chakra sensing, chakra sight, or true sight, and take the appearance of hand, claws, tentacles, or similar appendages of your choice. While not in use, they appear to orbit around you. They have a reach of 30ft and can be used as one additional hand, which can do anything that a hand can be used for, except for making attacks or for the HS component of non-asagami clan hijutsu. The reach of your Vectors and Chakra sight becomes 60ft at 7th level, and 120ft at 18th level.

You also gain the Vector Action Special action, which can be used to make an object interaction with your Vectors. You regain this action at the start of each of your turns.

Finally, a creature that can see your Vectors may damage them as if they where any other limp. Lost Vectors can be regrown with a casting of Medical Release: Regenerate or similar jutsu. At 11th level, you may spend 1 hit die as an Vector action to instantly restore your vectors.
